defensive role attribute | dropdownMenu trigger missing guaranteed aria-controls | Mobile navigation “open” function does not set `aria‑expanded="true"` on the trigger button | Mobile navigation “open” function does not set `aria‑hidden="false"` on the drawer element | Mobile navigation “close” via Escape key does not announce the state change to screen‑reader users | Mobile navigation “close” via outside click does not announce the state change | Mobile navigation trigger may lack `aria‑controls` because the drawer has no `id` attribute | Dropdown menu “open” function does not set `aria‑expanded="true"` on the trigger button | Dropdown menu “close” function does not set `aria‑expanded="false"` on the trigger button when closed via Escape or outside click | FAQ accordion “open” function does not update `aria‑expanded` on the question button | FAQ accordion “close” function does not update `aria‑expanded` on the question button | FAQ accordion “open” does not announce the expanded answer via a live region (only a generic announcement is made, but the specific question text is not included) | Dropdown menu panels are hidden with the `hidden` attribute but the script does not set `aria‑hidden="true"` when they are hidden (only CSS class removal) | Mobile navigation drawer is hidden via CSS classes without setting `aria‑hidden="true"` when closed (see Issue 2 for opening) | Mobile navigation trigger lacks `aria‑pressed` or `aria‑expanded` updates for the “open/close” state when the user toggles via the button (the script only updates `aria-expanded` on open, not on close) | Dropdown menu trigger button does not have `aria-pressed` or `aria-expanded` reset on close (mirroring Issue 7) | FAQ accordion panel is hidden with the `hidden` attribute but the script does not set `aria-hidden="true"` when collapsed (only adds the hidden attribute)

column1: # FALSE NEGATIVE DETAIL  (real issues the model failed to detect)
